message:
test(conformance): expand LCS command edge case coverage

Add 22 comprehensive conformance tests for LCS command:
- IDX mode with/without WITHMATCHLEN
- MINMATCHLEN filtering
- Empty strings, identical strings, no common subsequence
- Syntax errors (unknown option, missing args)
- MINMATCHLEN edge cases (negative, non-integer, filters all)
- WRONGTYPE errors, missing keys, LEN-only mode

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

         "value": 0
